svg.text: HLK-10M05 + PZEM-004T-100A + Relay + ESP32 38-Pin + SD + RTC + MP3-TF-16P
A. AC POWER, ENERGY SENSOR, RELAY CONTACTS, AND LOAD
HIGH VOLTAGE: isolate from low-voltage electronics
Net labels indicate common electrical connections

text.tspan: Fuse the live conductor before relay, HLK, and PZEM.
Use proper enclosure, wire gauge, strain relief, and insulation.
PZEM L/N are before relay so voltage can still be read when relay is OFF.
CT clamp measures only the live conductor going to load.
Use COM and NO. Leave NC unconnected for normal smart-plug behavior.
Neutral is not switched; it goes directly to load neutral.
Manual push button: GPIO25 to GND
Pairing reset button: GPIO27 to GND
Green LED: GPIO2 -> 220-330 ohm -> LED -> GND
HLK +5V -> ESP32 VIN/5V, relay, PZEM, SD, and MP3 VCC.
ESP32 3V3 -> RTC VCC only. All GND pins are common.

svg.text: Verify the real pin labels on each module before soldering or applying mains power.
